Subject: Request for Short Extension on Contract Review Deadline

Dear Counsel,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request a brief extension of our contract-review deadline by one week. The additional time would allow us to complete a thorough review and ensure that any comments or revisions we provide are constructive and well-considered on our client's behalf.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether this extension is agreeable. We appreciate your flexibility and look forward to continuing to work collaboratively toward a prompt resolution. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
